pattern: Walk the integer stream in order; Push every number, then Pop any that are not in the target set, stopping as soon as all targets are matched.
hints: Iterate through 1, 2, ..., n in order; Push each number onto the stack regardless of whether it belongs to target.
If the pushed number is not the next value needed from target, immediately Pop it to remove the unwanted element.
Stop the moment you have collected all elements of target — further stream values are not needed.

edge_inputs.description: target is exactly [1] — one Push, done
target has one element at the end of the stream
target has all 100 elements from 1 to 100
target starts at 3 — must push-pop 1 and 2 first
stop early even though stream continues further

stress.description: random strictly increasing target of up to 50 elements from 1..100
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    import random
    n = size
    k = rng.randint(1, min(n, 50))
    target = sorted(rng.sample(range(1, n + 1), k))
    return [target, n]
